hero.title: Free Water for Everyone
hero.subtitle: Join our mission to make clean, free water accessible to communities worldwide

home.welcomeSubtitle: Empowering communities through free, clean water
home.missionText: We believe that access to clean water is a fundamental right. Our mission is to provide free, clean drinking water to communities in need.
home.heroSubtitle: From mountain springs to your hands — in 100% recyclable tetrapacks.

pureMountain.title: Pure Mountain Source
pureMountain.description: Sourced from pristine mountain aquifers, naturally filtered through ancient rock formations.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Packaging
sustainable.description: 100% recyclable tetrapacks with 50% less carbon footprint than plastic bottles.

socialImpact.title: Social Impact
socialImpact.description: Every purchase provides 1 day of clean drinking water to communities in need.

zeroWaste.title: Zero Waste
zeroWaste.description: Renewable energy production and plastic-free supply chain.

cta.title: Ready to Experience the Difference?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands who've already made the switch to a better, more sustainable future.

carousel.title: THIRST HAS NO BORDERS
carousel.subtitle: Three sizes. One mission. Zero plastic.

blueberry.subtitle: Iced Tea
blueberry.description: Berry chaos in every sip. 20 calories.

water.title: Free Water Initiative
water.description: Access to clean, safe drinking water for everyone

contact.subject: Subject

advertising.title: More Than Advertising.
advertising.intro: Every day, thousands of hands reach for GRATIS. Not just for hydration, but as a symbol of sustainable living and street authenticity. Your brand can be part of this story.

movement.title: The Movement
movement.description: From street corners to festival stages, GRATIS has become the hydration choice for urban culture enthusiasts.

connection.title: The Connection
connection.description: Every pack is a daily touchpoint—intimate, authentic, and carried with pride by our community.

impact.title: The Impact
impact.description: Your brand doesn't just get seen. It becomes part of the culture, the movement, the lifestyle.

gratis.title: GRATIS — Premium Hydration for a Purpose
gratis.subtitle: Three revolutionary beverage lines. Infinitely recyclable aluminum bottles. 100% advertising revenue donated to verified NGOs worldwide.
gratis.badge: G.R.A.T.I.S — Giving Resources to Achieve Transformative and Impactful Change
gratis.waterDesc: Premium natural spring water in infinitely recyclable aluminum bottles. Pure hydration, zero compromise.
gratis.theurgyDesc: Mystic-positioned functional water infused with adaptogens, vitamins, and natural botanicals. Elevate your hydration ritual.
gratis.theurgyTagline: Transform. Harmonize. Elevate. Unite. Revive. Grace. Yield.
gratis.fuDesc: Caffeine-powered energy water with rebellious attitude. For those who refuse to settle. Fuel your fire.

waterPage.title: W.A.T.E.R — Pure Natural Spring Water
waterPage.description: Premium natural spring water in 100% recyclable aluminum bottles
waterPage.seoTitle: GRATIS Water — Pure Power, Pure Purpose
waterPage.seoDescription: Mountain-sourced water in sustainable tetrapacks. 100% natural, 0% artificial, infinitely recyclable.

product.title: GRATIS WATER
product.subtitle: Mountain Spring • Tetrapack
product.description: From pristine mountain springs to your hands — in 100% recyclable tetrapacks. No plastic. No guilt. Just pure hydration that funds clean water access worldwide.

distributionSection.title: DISTRIBUTION LOCATIONS
distributionSection.description: We distribute free GRATIS water at major train stations during rush hours. Every bottle is advertiser-funded and 100% free to you.

waterFeatures.title: Why GRATIS Water?
waterFeatures.fundsWaterDesc: Every purchase funds clean water access

goldenTicket.title: Golden Ticket Hunt
goldenTicket.description: Every 100K Series has ONE golden ticket hidden under the cap. Find it and claim exclusive prizes!
goldenTicket.prizes: Prizes include VIP experiences, merchandise, and more!

environmental.title: Plastic Recycling Is A Myth
environmental.description: Less than 9% of plastic ever produced has been recycled. That's why we chose tetrapacks — they're actually recyclable and have a 3x lower carbon footprint than plastic bottles.
environmental.cta: Every GRATIS Water you drink makes a difference. Join the movement.

testimonials.title: What People Are Saying
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands who've made the switch
testimonials.review1: Finally, water that doesn't cost the planet. The tetrapack is genius.
testimonials.review2: I switched from plastic bottles and never looked back. Tastes amazing too!
testimonials.review3: Love that every bottle helps provide clean water to those in need.

sparkPage.description: Every action ignites change. Choose your path to impact.

tribePage.title: TRIBE — Our Values
tribePage.subtitle: Born from the belief that every sip should serve a greater purpose.
tribePage.description2: GRATIS isn't just water. It's a movement built on authenticity, respect, and responsibility. Explore the values that drive everything we do.

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.description: Born from street culture. Built on authenticity. Discover the origin story that shaped our mission.

ethics.title: Ethics
ethics.description: Fair trade, cultural respect, and community investment. Our commitment to doing right by everyone.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.description: Real-time tracking, verified impact, and independent audits. Every euro accounted for.

team.title: Team
team.description: Meet the diverse crew building GRATIS. Real people from the culture, creating something authentic.

standards.title: Standards
standards.description: Quality without compromise. Safety you can trust. Excellence in every bottle we produce.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: Environmental commitments that protect the planet that sustains us all. Action over words.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Open books, public financials, and radical transparency. No secrets, no spin—just facts.
